source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
In the $8 \times 6$ grid pictured, there are 24 squares that have not been cut by either of the two diagonals. Now we draw the two diagonals on a $10 \times 6$ grid. How many squares in this grid will not be cut by either of the two diagonals?
<image1>

issues: metadata.image_paths 与顶层 image_paths 不一致：metadata 中为 images/1099.jpg，顶层中为 outputs/mathvision_300_3040/run_053a22a217c324a7/datasets/mathvision/artifacts/images/prob_9f25f5fa1cae6b6f7bbb3cc7_primary.png。

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'grid pictured' and refers to diagonals drawn on the grid
the task depends on geometric/visual structure of diagonals intersecting grid squares, although the 8x6 reference count is stated in text
multi_step: solving requires reasoning about which squares are cut by the two diagonals in a 10x6 grid, not just reading a value
the prompt gives a related 8x6 case with count 24, suggesting transfer/pattern-based or formula-based reasoning across grid sizes
this is a geometry/counting task with combined conditions ('not cut by either of the two diagonals'), which supports at least two-step reasoning
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a single number ('32')
the result can be checked by combinatorial/geometric counting or programmatic enumeration of crossed squares

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图像资产均存在，核心语义支撑完整，asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true。
答案为可验证的数值型结果，且题目可通过几何/计数方法复核。
